entries.meaning: The resumed model did not use fulfilled evidence.
The resumed model claimed completion without grounding the artifact in fulfilled evidence.
Evidence content and policy action are inconsistent.
The resumed model preserved the prior missing-evidence state after evidence was fulfilled.
The model returned parseable JSON with the wrong action shape.
Provider content was not a primary parseable JSON object.
Primary parsing failed but secondary recovery found a scoreable object. This remains diagnostic only.
Provider error prevented model-authored content preservation.
Append-only request, fulfillment, or resume linkage failed.
Preserved artifacts do not support a sharper classification.
